help_info:
I'm based on modules and submodules. Each module has submodules and each submodule has commands.

Type `{0}modules` to get a list with all modules and submodules.

Type `{0}commands <moduleName>` or `{0}commands <submoduleName>` to get a list with all commands from the module or submodule.
Example: `{0}commands Administration`, `{0}commands Server`

Type `{0}allcommands` to get a list with all commands.
Check https://rias.gg/commands to see all commands with their description and examples.
help_invite_me: [**Invite me** - I would like to be in your server]({0})
help_website: [**Website** - Check info about me or about the commands]({0})
help_command_not_found: I couldn't find that command. For help type `{0}help`
help_modules_list_title: The list with all modules and submodules
help_modules_list_footer: To get all commands type type {0}cmds. To get all commands for a module or submodule type {0}cmds <module> or {0}cmds <submodule>
help_module_not_found: I couldn't find the module or submodule. Type `{0}modules` to get all modules and submodules.
help_command_info: For a specific command info type {0}h <command>
utility_prefix_is: My prefix in this server is **{0}**.
utility_prefix_name_or_mention: My prefix in this server is my **name** or my **mention**.
